title: crataegus monogyna f. intermedia
intro: Crataegus monogyna f. intermedia, also known as the hawthorn shrub, is a hybrid plant derived from the hawthorn tree (Crataegus monogyna), which is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Crataegus monogyna f. intermedia include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve heart function, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of using this plant include reducing the risk of heart disease, lowering cholesterol levels, and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Crataegus monogyna f. intermedia include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to promote overall cardiovascular well-being.
